reviews.review_description:
First of -> it's awesome. Basically, you can have a private concert that you can place anywhere you want in your room and even adjust the size of the artists so it's an action figure sized musician playing on your couch table...or why not make it life size. It's all possible. It is as some reviews have stated "the future" of experiencing a concert at home, and I wholeheartedly agree.
I would love to see this app get more attention so that the library of content grows over time. To be honest, I am a bit surprised that this app is not more well known. Please keep it going and keep pushing it out there...it's good stuff.

reviews.review_title: SCENEZ XR is THE gold standard!
reviews.review_description: SCENEZ XR delivers an astonishingly lifelike holographic performance straight to my living room, unmatched by any other AR or VR experience out there. Unlike old-time 360 video VR performances, SCENEZ XR allows you to walk up to and around every artist performing in stunning 4D. The realism is unparalleled, making it feel like a live concert right in your own home. The ability to set the stage anywhere, resize the artists to fit your space, and go completely hands-free elevates the experience to a new level. SCENEZ XR sets the gold standard for virtual performances, and I can't wait to see what they bring next!

This app is so freaking amazing. It's like Princess Leia in Star Wars as a hologram in my home except these are incredible musicians performing. I really love that you can "Size" the experience to make the artist really tiny or extra large. I showed my friends this and they were all freaking out on how cool it is. Recommended!!

SceneZ XR allows me to sit on the couch, and watch performances and see everything around me in my living room! I love that! I love seeing whats around me and seeing the live performances while eating a snack or sitting on the couch.

We had a group of friends in here playing trivia game, then we decided to express our artistic abilities and make some insane 3D drawings for us all to enjoy together.
Great job to the brain behind this project.

Scenez XR is pure fire! I was vibing to Rich the Kid while crushing emails. Jay R's "Parachute" was a total vibe, and Juvahn's collaboration with Mark Pelli was absolute gold. It felt like a live concert right in my living room.

I set the artist's stage anywhere I wanted to—in my game room, dining room, wherever. You can resize the artist to fit your space—on your desk or larger than life. I went hands-free: no controllers needed. And the coolest part? You can walk around the artists 360 degrees and see your spot! I can’t wait to see what artists Scenez XR brings next!
I’ve never experienced such an amazing be universe. The artists are all so good. I had fun exploring each world.
